title: BudgetSnapshot v1
description: Budget usage snapshot returned by the engine for monitoring and circuit breaking.

wall_clock_s_remaining.description: Remaining wall-clock seconds under the BudgetEnvelope. Engine MUST clamp at 0 (never negative).

steps_remaining.description: null if max_steps was not set in the BudgetEnvelope.

nodes_used.description: Total IdeaNodes created so far in the campaign.

nodes_remaining.description: null if max_nodes was not set in the BudgetEnvelope.
